title: Business Loans Affiliate Program
h1: Get Paid To Help Small Businesses Access The Capital They Need To Scale!
metaDescription: Partner with Cardiff to offer fast unsecured business loans and cash flow lending for businesses. Join our affiliate program and start earning today.

blocks.text: Ready To Start Earning As An Affiliate?
Fill out the application below to get started!
Get Paid For Introductions
You don’t need to close the deal. Just refer a business that qualifies for funding — and you get paid. It’s fast, easy, and completely hands-off.
$12B+ Funded and Counting
Strengthen Your Network
Here’s How Cardiff’s New Affiliate Model Is Going To Turn Your Connections Into Commissions
Most affiliate programs only pay you if someone buys. If a deal closes. If they say yes.
Not us.
We’ll put money in your pocket as soon as your referral qualifies — not when they fund.

The Cardiff Affiliate Model Is Perfect For You… Monetize Your Network In 3 Simple Steps Get Your Affiliate Link If you successfully qualify for our affiliate program – you will get your own affiliate link which will be the engine of your money making machine.
Refer Business Owners

Follow our proven step-by-step strategy on promoting your affiliate link in the most effective way. Our Trainings, Live Calls, and Done-For-You Marketing Assets will give you a detailed action plan and guide you through the process to make sure you maximize your profits.
Get PAID

Remember, you get paid for every client you refer who is QUALIFIED! Get a business owner to simply apply, and even if they don’t take the loan – you still keep your share. This way your hard work will almost certainly never be without a reward.
The Cardiff Affiliate Program Is Perfect For:
Marketing Agency Owners
Accountants
Consultants
Payroll Service Providers
Bankers
Community Builders
Business Event Hosts
Financial Advisors
OR anyone who knows the business owners!
We Provide All The Direction, Guidance & Support You’ll Need To Succeed!
Done For You Marketing Assets
Live Monthly Trainings
Get Paid Fast & On Time
Community Support
This Is The Easiest Money You’ve Never Made.
And the biz owners you know? They already need this!

items: You already know the business owners
You just need an affiliate link to send over to them

blocks.text: Here Is How We Service The Small Businesses YOU REFER!
Get Approved
The businesses you refer will fill out a questionnaire about their business and will get approved in less than 2 minutes.
Find the best tailored terms
They will choose the terms that’s best for their budget so they can comfortably pay back the loan.
Ready to scale
They can immediately access their funds up to $250,000 immediately after linking their business checking account to their Cardiff loan.
And remember, as long as they are approved (even if they don’t take the loan), you get paid!
Frequently Asked Questions
You can track qualified leads and funded loan commissions in your Impact.com dashboard. Click here to access the Impact Dashboard
You will gain access to ad imagery, ad videos, scripts to use to pitch, a Cardiff affiliate guide, and an exclusive Telegram support group. You will also be able to email support with any questions.
Click below. Become an affiliate. Get paid to be a connector.

and start referring as soon as today! 💸
